title: Tunisian Sesame Crumble Bites
description: A savory and crunchy bite-sized snack inspired by Tunisian cuisine, topped with a mixture of sesame seeds and crumble.
instructions: Roll out the savory puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into small squares, about 2 inches per side.
Brush the pastry squares with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Top each pastry square with a small spoonful of crumble.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles and press the edges to seal.
Place the triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each triangle.
Brush the tops of the pastry triangles with a little more olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for a few minutes before serving.
